name: ITIS Web Services API
description: The Integrated Taxonomic Information System (ITIS) Web Services provide access to the ITIS taxonomic database. Includes search functions, TSN-based data retrieval, hierarchy navigation, and metadata/reference data endpoints. All endpoints are read-only GET requests with no authentication required.
